name: Futile Last Stand
description:
Done by request of BaronVonSwagger and Shadow. That one Anne bot but its both Anne AND the user being captured, instead of Anne being captured by the user.

Hypnosis, mind control, etc. Can also be considered non-con, but that comes with hypno, so it should be expected.
